query:
SELECT s.sellerId, se.name, se.department, COUNT(*) as vendas, SUM(s.value) as totalValue
FROM sales s
JOIN sellers se ON se.id = s.sellerId
WHERE s.status = 'approved'
AND CAST(s.createdAt AS CHAR) >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
AND CAST(s.createdAt AS CHAR) < '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY s.sellerId, se.name, se.department
ORDER BY vendas DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT s.sellerId, se.name, se.department, COUNT(*) as vendas, SUM(s.value) as totalValue
FROM sales s
JOIN sellers se ON se.id = s.sellerId
WHERE s.status = 'approved'
AND CAST(s.createdAt AS CHAR) >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
AND CAST(s.createdAt AS CHAR) < '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY s.sellerId, se.name, se.department
ORDER BY vendas DESC;
